atlas v0.5
Back To Families

Contemporary Web Family

Magazine Editorial

Feature-led publishing surfaces. The fold behaves like a cover or lead spread, not like a generic SaaS hero.

Historical Roots

Art Deco / Streamlined LuxurySwiss / International Typographic Style

Structure Fit

Dossier / FeatureArchive Stack

Interpretation

怎么借这条家族，而不是只模仿表面

Signature

  • feature-first hierarchy
  • headline-image tension
  • cover-story rhythm
  • secondary stories feel curated

Borrow

  • strong lead image or cover block
  • decks, bylines, captions, section labels
  • clear editorial pacing from lead to secondary stories

Best For

  • cultural publishing
  • feature homepages
  • brand magazines
  • essay archives

Avoid When

  • users need fast task completion
  • the page depends on heavy filtering
  • there are too few stories to justify a magazine frame

Sample Gallery

真实网站样本

从真实站点看这条家族是怎样落地的。

Historical Roots

它从哪些更早的语言长出来

1920s-1930s

France / Europe / US

Art Deco / Streamlined Luxury

几何装饰、流线感和高级感并存。今天它更多以精致和舞台感回到网页中。

Descendant Families

Quiet Lifestyle EditorialStage-Driven Showcase
Open movement

1950s-1970s

Switzerland

Swiss / International Typographic Style

网格、对齐、无衬线、秩序感。它是今天大量知识型、设计型、档案型网页的基础语法之一。

Descendant Families

Swiss Typographic GridEvidence-Dense Knowledge Surface
Open movement

Prompt DNA

可以直接给 agent 的风格 packet

Prompt DNA

Magazine Editorial

Use a magazine editorial family: cover-like lead story, large image-led first fold, supporting story stack, disciplined serif hierarchy, and a publication rhythm instead of a SaaS feature grid.

Reference Packet

继续打开真实站点看细节

  • Frieze
  • T Magazine
  • The New Yorker

Design Zondev is a design-style atlas: movement → family → structure → prompt packet.
